summary: CMS Expanded to 137 Sections - All Features Working. Admin CMS page loads with 7 category tabs (Homepage:4, Core Pages:6, Services:7, Solutions:43, Locations:41, Content Pages:32, Personas:4). Solution pages have structured SeoTemplate editor. Location pages have GeoPage editor. Misc/Content pages have JSON editor. Search filters within active tab. All frontend pages render correctly with hardcoded fallback content when no CMS data exists.

minor.issue: 5-minute cache (TTL 300s) may delay seeing CMS updates on frontend
Endpoint allows requests without auth token (design decision)

admin_cms_page.search_functionality: PASS - filters sections within active category tab

critical_code_review_comments: CMS_SECTIONS array correctly defines all 137 sections with proper keys and categories
SeoTemplateEditor provides structured editing for hero, audience, problems, deliverables, process, pricing, trust signals, conversion sections
GeoPageEditor provides structured editing for location pages with communities, services, FAQs, stats
GenericPageEditor (JSON) is used for misc content pages and personas
useCms hook correctly skips fetch for '_noop_' key when cmsKey prop not provided
Cache invalidation happens on admin save via cache.delete(f'cms:{key}')

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages render correctly, admin CMS works)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing CMS seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: CMS expanded from 17 to 137 sections. Admin CMS page has 7 tabs. Solutions use SeoTemplateEditor (43 pages), Locations use GeoPageEditor (41 pages), Content/Personas use JSON editor (36 pages). API endpoints: GET /api/cms/sections/{key} for single, GET /api/cms/sections?keys=... for bulk, PUT /api/admin/content/settings/{key} for save. Frontend pages use useCms hook with cmsKey prop - when no CMS data exists, pages fall back to hardcoded props. Cache TTL is 300s on public CMS endpoints.
